generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder for position and speed data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataStream
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder for position and speed data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataStream
]

instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for input current data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataStream
]

instance PositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for position data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataStream
]

instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for speed data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataStream
]

instance AccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for acceleration data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataStream
]

instance TorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for torque data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorDataStream
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot from MABI Robotic AG, consisting of a motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox, with a maximum working range of [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed of 75°/s, used for machining applications"
]

instance RobotSensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, InputCurrentSensor, PositionSensor, SpeedSensor, AccelerationSensor, TorqueSensor
]

instance FrictionLossDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction loss detection insights used to update control parameters for improved robot motion accuracy"
]

instance ControlParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Indirect parameter adjustments for control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of robot state and friction detection results"
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDetectionInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through friction model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterAdjustmentAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization via dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for data linking"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for reference"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationToolsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for integrated visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured acceleration data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs from digital twin models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationToolsEnabler
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural models including Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for gearwheel"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for data linking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellsEnabler, DashboardVisualizationToolsEnabler
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisDigitalShadow : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MABIMAX100FirstAxis
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow is a passive system with one-way data flow and does not send data back to the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with live sensor data streamed via MQTT; continuous processing of operational data for friction model updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML structural model, Simulink simulation models, AAS for data linking, MQTT data streaming, and dashboard visualization to create a unified digital shadow for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated); digital shadow continuously updated with live data during robot operation to account for wear and changing conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data against measured reference data; continuous multi-physics-aware identification of friction models to ensure accuracy during operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Industrie 4.0 standards via Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML for system modeling."
]
